name: Bobbin Around with BOB the Drag Queen
original_name: Bobbin Around with BOB the Drag Queen
overview: Since winning season 8 of RuPaul’s Drag Race, Bob the Drag Queen has been traveling the world with her bubbly assistant Luis. Check out videos from their adventures and learn where to find the spiciest meat in Brazil and how to find the hottest trade in Australia. This odd couple is sure to make you smile.

trailers.title: BOBbin Around: Brazil - WOW Presents Plus Sneak Peek
